# Support Vector Machine

**Summary**: A supervised learning model that finds the optimal hyperplane to separate classes.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-kusuma|Kusuma, 2023]] used SVM for spatial prediction of facies in 2D and 3D space.
